mapper.select: SELECT STORE_CLOSING_ID AS storeClosingId, BUSINESS_DATE AS businessDate, CLOSING_MEMO AS closingMemo, CLOSED_AT AS closedAt, STORE_ID AS storeId FROM STORE_CLOSINGS WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId} ORDER BY BUSINESS_DATE DESC
SELECT STORE_CLOSING_ID AS storeClosingId, BUSINESS_DATE AS businessDate, CLOSING_MEMO AS closingMemo, CLOSED_AT AS closedAt, STORE_ID AS storeId FROM STORE_CLOSINGS ORDER BY BUSINESS_DATE DESC

SELECT STORE_CLOSING_ID AS storeClosingId, BUSINESS_DATE AS businessDate, CLOSING_MEMO AS closingMemo, CLOSED_AT AS closedAt, STORE_ID AS storeId FROM STORE_CLOSINGS WHERE STORE_CLOSING_ID = #{closingId}

SELECT STORE_CLOSING_ITEM_ID AS storeClosingItemId, SYSTEM_QUANTITY AS systemQuantity, PHYSICAL_QUANTITY AS physicalQuantity, DISPOSAL_QUANTITY AS disposalQuantity, CLOSING_ITEM_MEMO AS closingItemMemo, MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT AS materialNameSnapshot, STORE_CLOSING_ID AS storeClosingId, STORE_INVENTORY_ID AS storeInventoryId FROM STORE_CLOSING_ITEMS WHERE STORE_CLOSING_ID = #{closingId} ORDER BY STORE_CLOSING_ITEM_ID

SELECT SI.STORE_INVENTORY_ID AS storeInventoryId, SI.CURRENT_QUANTITY AS currentQuantity, SI.MATERIAL_ID AS materialId, M.MATERIAL_NAME AS materialName FROM STORE_INVENTORIES SI JOIN MATERIALS M ON SI.MATERIAL_ID = M.MATERIAL_ID WHERE SI.STORE_ID = #{storeId} ORDER BY M.MATERIAL_NAME
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_STORE_CLS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO STORE_CLOSINGS ( STORE_CLOSING_ID, BUSINESS_DATE, CLOSING_MEMO, CLOSED_AT, STORE_ID ) VALUES ( #{storeClosingId}, #{businessDate}, #{closingMemo}, SYSDATE, #{storeId} )

SELECT SEQ_STORE_CLS_ITEM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO STORE_CLOSING_ITEMS ( STORE_CLOSING_ITEM_ID, SYSTEM_QUANTITY, PHYSICAL_QUANTITY, DISPOSAL_QUANTITY, CLOSING_ITEM_MEMO, MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT, STORE_CLOSING_ID, STORE_INVENTORY_ID ) VALUES ( #{storeClosingItemId}, #{systemQuantity}, #{physicalQuantity}, #{disposalQuantity}, #{closingItemMemo}, #{materialNameSnapshot}, #{storeClosingId}, #{storeInventoryId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE STORE_INVENTORIES SET CURRENT_QUANTITY = #{quantity}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE STORE_INVENTORY_ID = #{storeInventoryId}
mapper.select: SELECT STORE_CLOSING_ID AS storeClosingId, BUSINESS_DATE AS businessDate, CLOSING_MEMO AS closingMemo, CLOSED_AT AS closedAt, STORE_ID AS storeId FROM STORE_CLOSINGS WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId} ORDER BY BUSINESS_DATE DESC
